title: About the League
content:
About the League

The Millvale Youth Baseball League is a volunteer-run league for kids ages 7 to 10, playing spring and summer at Millvale Community Park. Head coach Joyce Brandt has run the program for years.

title: Contact
content:
Contact

Questions about the season? Reach Coach Joyce Brandt at the field, or email the league. Games and practices are held at Millvale Community Park, Millvale, PA 15209.

title: Registration
content:
Registration

Spring registration is open. The season fee covers a jersey, cap, and end-of-season party. Scholarships are available - just ask Coach Joyce. Register your player online or in person at Millvale Community Park.
